cards.prompt: Func<int,int> op = Twice; печать op(21); op = n => n + 100; печать op(21); — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; int Twice(int n) => n * 2; Func<int,int> op = Twice; Console.WriteLine(op(21)); op = n => n + 100; Console.WriteLine(op(21));

cards.prompt: op.Method.Name и op.GetType().BaseType.Name для Func<int,int> op = Twice — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; int Twice(int n) => n * 2; Func<int,int> op = Twice; Console.WriteLine(op.Method.Name); Console.WriteLine(op.GetType().BaseType.Name);

cards.prompt: greet("lo") через Func<string,string> и greet is Delegate — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; string Hi(string who) => "hi " + who; Func<string,string> greet = Hi; Console.WriteLine(greet("lo")); Console.WriteLine(greet is Delegate);
